payload.summary_zh: GEOFlow 2.0 强化后台运营闭环，补充分发管理、目标渠道站点包、静态页面生成、远端设置同步、分发队列与日志可见性，并将首次安装后的后台说明改为部署检查清单。
payload.summary_en: GEOFlow 2.0 strengthens the admin operating loop with distribution management, target-site packages, static page generation, remote settings sync, distribution queue visibility, richer logs, and a first-deployment admin guide.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级前请备份数据库、.env、uploads、storage 和目标渠道站点包；升级后请重新清理配置/视图缓存，并按分发管理页面提示重新下载目标站点包。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: Before upgrading, back up your database, .env, uploads, storage, and target-site packages. After upgrading, clear config/view caches and download the refreshed target-site package from Distribution Management.
